titleStmt.title: SII 24.525: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswamy
No. 525. (A.R. No. 67 of 1938.) WEST WALL OF THE CHANDANA-MAṆḌAPA, NORTH END

summary.p: Registers grant of lands in Peruṅgāvūr of Kīḻaimuṟi in Vaḍagarai Maḻanāḍu by Nallā-piḷḷai, son of Kaṇḍiyūr Iruḷappar, towards lamp and offerings on the third day of the festival in the month of Māśi at the Ellaikkarai-maṇḍapam built by him. The details of the date viz., Śaka 1542, Raudri, Vaiyāśī 11, Ṛishabha, ba. 10, Tuesday, Aśvati correspond to A.D. 1620, May 16, Tuesday, 98, Uttiraṭṭādi (not Aśvati), ·89.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhama[ stu*] svastiśrī . cakāptam 1000 5 100 4 10 2 Itaṉ mel cellā niṉṟa ravuttiri varuṣam vaiyāci
mātam 10 1 § Iṣabhaṉāyattu Aparapakṣattu daśamiyum maṅkaḷavāramum peṟṟa Asvavati nakṣatrattu ṉāḷ teṉkarai
pāṇṭiya kulācaṉi vaḷanāṭṭu viḷāvaṟāviti vaḷanāṭṭu tiruvaraṅkam tiruppati perumāḷ śrīraṅganādhadeva
r śrīpaṇṭārattukku Aṭiyeṉ kaṇṭiyūr Iruḷappar puttiraṉ nallā piḷḷaiyeṉ teṇṭaṉ camaṟpittu śilāsā
śanam paṇṇikkuṭu*ttapaṭi Aṭiyeṉuṭaiya Upaiyamāka teṟ ttiruṉāḷ māci mātam muṉṟāntiruṉāḷai
kku Aṭiyeṉuṭaiya Upaiyamāka vaṭatirukkāveri teṉ piṟattil karai Ellai kaṭṭaḷai Eṭṭāṉ
tiruṉāḷaikku Ellaikkarai maṇṭapamāka Aṭiyeṉ kaṭṭivitta maṇṭapattil Eṟiyaruḷu
kaiyil tirukkuttu maṇiviḷakkukku ney yum paṭi 2- kku tiruvantikkāppu kku vilai pu3 ti 1000
ttukku Elam U¢ Amutuceytaruḷum poriyamutu 37kku poṉ 3pu1 Ati kku poṉ 8 U 4 vaṭai
3 100- kku poṉ 4 pu2 tocai 3 100- kku poṉ 4pu2 veccukkūṉ 4 10kku poṉ 8 pāṉakam kūṉ4 10kku
poṉ 1 cemattaḷikai 2- kku poṉ 1pu- 2 campā taḷikai 6 10- kku poṉ 10 2 cantaṇappaṭi 3 10- kku
poṉ 6 pākku 8 10- kku vettilai 1000- ttukku pu6 kaṟiyamutu tayir vilai pu- 5 teṅkāy 100-kku Iḷanīr 100-kku pu- 8
vantattukku neypaṭi 3 10- kku poṉ 3pu5 koṭikkuṭaipiṭitta kūlikku pu- 1 Āka poṉ 6 10 Intap poṉ Aṟu
patukku poliyūṭṭāka cetta vaṭakarai maḻaṉāṭu kiḻaimuṟi peruṅkāvūril maḻaiṉāṭṭu
koṉār kāṇiyāṭṣi Aṣṭamaṅkalamākavum poṉ koṇṭu cetta vaṭakku 2 100
nañcai kku2 100 niṅkalāka rūpāy kūlikku vi m periya tiruvārā tiruttu
nilam pa ma perumāḷ māḷ nilam viṭaiContinuation not traceable.
Digital edition of SII 24.525 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
